name: Digia Oyj
summary: Digia Oyj provides software and services for organizations to develop services, manage business, and utilize data in Finland and internationally. The company offers service design and business consulting services; e-commerce solutions that designs and builds online stores; product information management services; applications and tailored mobile solutions; data and analytics solutions; integration and application programming interface solutions; and monitoring and service management solutions. It also provides enterprise resource planning (ERP) solutions comprising Digia Enterprise, an ERP system; financial solutions for fund management and asset management companies, and brokers; Microsoft Dynamics 365, an end-to-end business solution; Digia Logistics, an ERP system for logistics and forwarding companies; and customer relationship management (CRM) solutions. The company serves energy, banking and investment services, insurance, grocery, manufacturing, public sector, retail and wholesale, service business, social and healthcare services, and logistics industries, as well as trade unions and unemployment funds. Digia Oyj is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.
